title: 1.20 PvP
description: The 1.20.1 PvP Experience, Refined, Perfected To The Point That This Modpack Makes You a Better PvPer
body:
# 1.20 PvP
**Don't Play Vanilla, Play This!**

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd215d232202ab0dcabf0fe347e237c59094234d.jpeg)

This modpack is completely centered arround PvP and made along with a (mctiers) tier 2 player, making it **The BEST 1.20 PvP Modpack**


<details>
<summary>Feature List</summary>

  - **Optimization**, adding up to **400FPS**.
  
  - **Client Side Crystals**, making **CPvP** less ping dependant.

  - **Shader Support**, for those **weridos** that like to PvP with shaders.

  - **And More!**, there are a lot of **QoF** features that aren't big enough to have their own point.
</details>
